title: Swap Helper
description: swap helper automatically performs breach swap making mace combat smoother and faster.
body:
# 🛠️ Swap Helper

Swap Helper is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that automatically performs breach swapping when using a mace. No manual swapping required — the mod handles it instantly so you can focus on combat.

Designed for players who want smoother gameplay and faster reaction time during fights.
yt link :- https://youtube.com/@zolloww-1m?si=1SS26-dyY_hHn12l
## ⚙️ Features

- ✔ Toggleable with Keybind (SEE AT KEYBIND SETTINGS IN GAME)
- ✔ Works with Sword & Axe
- ✔ Detects Mace only in Hotbar (Slots 1–9)
- ✔ Automatic StunSlam when holding Axe
- ✔ Instant swap → Attack → Swap back
- ✔ No conditions required
- ✔ Clean & lightweight
- ✔ No unnecessary UI
- ✔ PvP optimized

## ⚠️ Important

This mod is intended for survival mode gameplay only.

Do NOT use this on servers where automated combat assistance mods are not allowed.
Using this on restricted servers may result in a ban.

Always check server rules before using.

## 🎮 Recommended For
## 
Survival PvP

Practice worlds

Private servers with permission

Singleplayer survival

This mod is created by 2m6r.
